---
title: "enabling duel screen disables desktop effects"
date: 2008-02-02
forum: Desktop Effects &amp; Customization
---

### Post by oodledoodle on 2008-02-02
hi, after enabling duelscreen on my nvidia 6600gt i have lost compiz desktop effects.

i cant see anything in my xorg that might be stopping it, can anyone else help? heres my xorg

---

### Post by rune0077 on 2008-02-02
Don't use Xinarama, it won't work with Compiz. According to Nvidia, there's nothing to be done about this until they figure out how to get both working together. Until then, use TwinView instead, that gives you two screens and Compiz.

---
